title: Create: Fatal's QoL Crafting
description: Adds compatibility between Fatal’s QoL Crafting and Create
body:
Add compatibility between [Fatal's QoL Crafting](https://modrinth.com/mod/fatals-qol-crafting) and [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create).

- Stair recipe gives 8 instead of 4
- Create stones can be used in stone crafting recipes

Recipe list: https://www.notion.so/fatalmistake02/Recipes-24af9c81abac806ebc98de076dd455c8?source=copy_link

[Fatal's QoL Crafting](https://modrinth.com/mod/fatals-qol-crafting)(Version 1.1.0 or higher) and [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) are required

Made with [MCreator](https://mcreator.net/)
